summary: Patch the project owner platform-role synchronization migration to allow the production migration user to run the backfill.

notes: psa_sync_project_platform_roles now treats psa_admin as a trusted migration/maintenance executor, matching the production apply-migrations user.
Migration 116 had not been recorded in production schema_migrations before this patch because the previous attempt failed inside its transaction.

verification: Run static project-role platform sync migration coverage check.
Run npm --prefix frontend run build with production Vite variables and VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.13.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.13.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against https://xpjs.asia/ with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.13.
known_warnings: Vite still warns that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
Git may warn that LF will be converted to CRLF on this Windows workstation.
